approval_status: Explicit execution approval was granted by the owner in the task conversation on 2026-07-12. Authorization is limited to this four-run feasibility re-pilot in the workflow-support world generation (approval #14) and excludes the confirmatory K=5 campaign.
seal_method: The owner explicitly approved this four-run re-pilot on 2026-07-12. This PR's merge commit is the re-pilot execution seal. The old-generation confirmatory template (phase3_m3_loss_campaign_plan_20260710.json) remains frozen, untouched, and unauthorized; it will be re-authored in the new world generation only after this re-pilot passes.
question: Before spending on the confirmatory K=5 campaign, can one fresh R1 pair and one fresh R4 pair exercise every assigned endpoint and the R3 completion sentinel while preserving exact mutation-circulation exposure under the NEW world generation path (workflow support spec section 17.29)?

measurement_boundary.primary: Feasibility and integrity only: assigned-endpoint opportunity exercise, R3 opportunity exercise with zero R3 events, and exact manipulation-gate exposure in every run.
measurement_boundary.effect_estimation: Forbidden. Arm rates, paired deltas, direction, magnitude, and significance are not interpreted from this pilot.
measurement_boundary.confirmatory_exclusion: Pilot seeds, runs, events, opportunities, manifests, and summaries never enter the confirmatory K=5 campaign, must never be pooled with the 2026-07-10 pilot or the old-generation confirmatory template.
measurement_boundary.readiness: The pilot and its report do not update acceptance or readiness.

contrasts.hypothesis: Feasibility only; no directional hypothesis is tested.
Feasibility only; no directional hypothesis is tested.

preregistered_measurements.method: For each of the four runs, count opportunities for its assigned primary endpoint and R3 sentinel opportunities/events; also evaluate the exact mutation-circulation manipulation gate.
preregistered_measurements.decision_rule: Pass only if every run has at least one assigned-endpoint opportunity, every run has at least one R3 opportunity, all runs together and individually have zero R3 events, and the manipulation gate passes exactly. Any failure is no-go for the confirmatory campaign.

preregistered_measurements.method: Retain validated feasibility provenance but suppress confirmatory contrast interpretation.
preregistered_measurements.decision_rule: Do not estimate, compare, preview, or use control/treatment effects. Pilot results never enter K=5 and cannot change its hypotheses, endpoints, seeds, wave order, or decision rules.

execution_conditions.seeds_note: No seed 953 or 954 appears in tracked experiment specifications or local run metadata as of 2026-07-12. The 940-949 range remains reserved for the confirmatory template, while 953/954 are dedicated to this re-pilot and are excluded from every confirmatory analysis path.
execution_conditions.no_reseeding_rule: Infrastructure failures retry the same run ID and seed after explicit partial-root deletion; outcome-based replacement is forbidden.
execution_conditions.retry_manifest_rule: Preserve the original four-run manifest. Every retry must use a new --batch-dir and contain exactly the prior failed run IDs.

cost_guard.rule: The batch-sealed guard is authoritative: abort before launching any pilot run when available balance cannot be read or is below 7 credits.

proposed_execution_order: The owner granted re-pilot-only execution approval on 2026-07-12. Mark this PR Ready and merge it before any live run. The merge commit becomes the re-pilot execution seal. The old-generation confirmatory template is intentionally NOT updated and receives no authorization from this merge.
Check out that exact merge commit with a clean working tree and execute the full four-run re-pilot with both --batch-spec and --plan under the sealed seven-credit fail-closed guard.
Retry only manifest-recorded infrastructure failures with identical run IDs/seeds and a distinct retry batch directory.
Produce loss_events.json and loss_event_monitoring.json for every successful run, then run loss-event-campaign with the sealed plan and complete manifest chain.
Evaluate only pilot_gate and manipulation-gate integrity. Do not inspect or publish effect direction, paired deltas, or arm comparisons.

Record the re-pilot result and exact artifact hashes in a result PR regardless of outcome. Only pilot_gate.passed=true can satisfy the prerequisite for authoring and separately approving a new-generation confirmatory plan; re-pilot data is never pooled into K=5 or compared with the 2026-07-10 pilot.
owner_decisions_recorded_for_pilot_merge: Explicit re-pilot execution approval was granted on 2026-07-12; it covers only these four runs (seeds 953/954) in the workflow-support world generation.
This merge records no confirmatory execution authorization.
The four-run all-or-nothing feasibility gate and exact exposure gate apply unchanged.
Re-pilot seeds 953/954 are excluded from every confirmatory analysis and are never pooled or compared with the 2026-07-10 pilot (old world generation).

The old-generation confirmatory template's pinned pilot-plan SHA-256 intentionally keeps pointing at the 2026-07-10 pilot plan; that template is superseded and will be re-authored in the new generation after a passing re-pilot.
